question_text: A car is driving at a constant speed in a straight line on a flat road. Which statement best describes the forces acting on the car?

options.label: A
options.text: The driving force is greater than the friction force

options.label: B
options.text: The driving force equals the friction force

options.label: C
options.text: The friction force is greater than the driving force

options.label: D
options.text: There is no friction force acting on the car

explanation: At constant speed, acceleration is zero, so forces must be balanced. The driving force from the engine must equal the friction and air resistance to maintain steady motion without speeding up or slowing down.
